Events

Featured Upcoming Events

Mark your calendars and join our vibrant community for these exciting celebrations.

National Event

Independence Day Celebration

Join us for a meaningful and inspiring Independence Day Celebration. Engage in flag hoisting, quizzes, speeches, and poetry recitation.

Academic Drive

Community Book Fair & Exchange

Explore academic resources, donate books, and share knowledge. Whether you have books to donate or are looking for books that can support your learning journey, this event is for you.

Upcoming Events

National

Independence Day Celebration

↗
15 August 2026
09:00 AM - 12:00 PM

Join us for a meaningful and inspiring Independence Day Celebration. Engage in flag hoisting, quizzes, speeches, and poetry recitation. Let us come together to celebrate the spirit of independence and remember the heroes who shaped our nation.

Academic

Community Book Fair & Exchange

↗
Coming Soon
Stay Tuned

Explore academic resources, donate books, and share knowledge. Whether you have books to donate or are looking for books that can support your learning journey, this event is for you. Empowering students through learning and community collaboration.

Community

CA Aspirants & Professionals Meet-Up

↗
Coming Soon
Stay Tuned

Connect with CA professionals, discuss exam strategies, articleship, and career opportunities. Whether you are just beginning your CA journey or preparing for advanced levels, this meet-up will help you learn from real experiences.

Milestones & Memories

A look back at the memories and celebrations that shaped our community.

80+ Students Attended
3 March 2026

Holi Celebration 2026

Kripa Library celebrated Holi with immense joy, enthusiasm, and togetherness, bringing students together for a colorful and memorable gathering. The festive spirit was evident from the very beginning as students exchanged greetings and wished one another happiness and success.

60+ Students Attended
Basant Panchami, 2026

Basant Panchami Celebration 2026

Kripa Library celebrated Basant Panchami with devotion and simplicity, honoring Maa Saraswati, the goddess of knowledge, wisdom, and learning. The event was organized to seek blessings for the academic success and intellectual growth of students.

100+ Students Attended
1 January 2026

New Year Celebration 2026

Kripa Library welcomed the New Year 2026 with a grand and memorable celebration organized especially for its students. To make the occasion special, a dedicated hall was booked for the event, and entry passes were issued to students, ensuring a well-organized and exciting gathering.

Photos Gallery

Every chapter of our story, captured in a frame.

Kripa Library

Kripa Library (often referred to as Kripa Library & Reading Room) is a popular private study space located in the Mandawali area of East Delhi.

Visit Us

168, Ground floor,
Mandawali Pandit
Mohalla, Front of Durga
Mandir Delhi, 110092

kripalibrary@gmail.com+91 7838004416
